biography: Northside Neighborhood Sandwich Café 🥪 Support Local Businesses Tues - Fri 8a-4p Sat & Sun 9a-3p

top_videos.text: Make sure you stop in to Idas Sandwich Shop 🥪 #pittsburgh #pittsburghfoodie #pittsburghfood #sandwichshop #familybusiness
top_videos.author: heatherfitfoodie

top_videos.text: What I’m wearing today 🖤💛 make sure you stop by Idas Sandwich Shop for specials! #steelers #draftweekend #nfldraft #stufftodoinpittsburgh #outfitoftheday

top_videos.text: Ida’s has salads too but if you know about Pittsburgh salads fries are always part of the recipe 😊 you can get the chicken grilled or fried. #idassandwichshop #pittsburgheats #pittsburghfoodie #wheretoeatinpittsburgh #pittsburghsalad
